# Phase 5: Dashboard Live-Mode & Vet-Intake - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-22
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated (discuss skipped via workflow.skip_discuss)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

The dashboard demonstrates the full real stack on camera — real mesh sessions (from Phase 1 session registry) with real wake events, real attestation Merkle appends, a visibly paused cost ticker, agent-lane motion polish, a real pixel-head detection panel (from Phase 2), and a rendered rancher-readable vet-intake packet produced during the sick-cow scenario. NO design-system rebuild — existing `web/` aesthetic (custom Canvas `RanchMap`, Tailwind v4 `@theme` tokens, Fraunces/Inter/JetBrains Mono, PWA) stays.

Requirements: DASH-01, DASH-02, DASH-03, DASH-04, DASH-05, DASH-06, SCEN-01.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All implementation choices at Claude's discretion — discuss skipped per `workflow.skip_discuss=true`. UI-SPEC will be generated by `/gsd-ui-phase 5` during autonomous execution (UI hint set in ROADMAP).

### Known Constraints from Audit
- Existing `web/` is judge-worthy per audit — polish + live-mode wire, do NOT rebuild
- Depends on Phase 1 (session registry for real mesh injection in FastAPI app)
- Depends on Phase 2 (pixel-head detection panel for DASH-06)
- Depends on Phase 4 (live-mode `make dashboard` plumbing — Phase 5 adds the UX layer on that plumbing)
- Server live-path coverage must rise from 73% → ≥85%
- Cost ticker UI must have a visibly distinguishable "paused" state — not only a numeric change (judges watching a video won't notice a `0.08` → `0.00` flicker)
- Attestation panel must stream live Merkle appends via SSE with a verify-chain button
- Vet-intake packet: HerdHealthWatcher (possibly via a "Doc" skill) drafts a rancher-readable text/markdown packet in sick-cow scenario, logged to a retrievable location, linked from the dashboard
- All 5 agents must appear on distinct lanes with real session IDs from `runtime/agent_ids.json`, real wake events, real tool calls — not mock fixtures
- Lighthouse score ≥90 on the SPA

</decisions>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

Scoped files:
- `src/skyherd/server/app.py:88-94,164-181,189-195` — live-path dependency injection (73% covered)
- `src/skyherd/server/events.py:293-315,349-370,386-393` — SSE live broadcaster
- `src/skyherd/server/cost.py` or `src/skyherd/agents/cost.py` — cost ticker source
- `src/skyherd/attest/ledger.py` + `signer.py` — already has verify-chain capability (97-98% covered)
- `web/src/components/RanchMap.tsx` — existing custom Canvas renderer (~250 lines)
- `web/src/components/AgentLane.tsx` — custom ops-console styling
- `web/src/components/RancherPhone.tsx` — 497-line phone-first dark layout
- `web/src/index.css` — Tailwind v4 `@theme` tokens
- `web/public/manifest.webmanifest` + `web/src/sw.ts` — PWA
- `runtime/agent_ids.json` — live platform agent IDs
- `src/skyherd/scenarios/sick_cow.py` — target for vet-intake insertion
- `src/skyherd/agents/herd_health_watcher.py` — draft-vet-intake logic site
- `skills/ranch-ops/` or `skills/cattle-behavior/` — likely home for a `doc-vet-intake.md` skill if the Doc pattern is used

</code_context>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- Cost ticker "paused" state: dim + pulse animation + "IDLE" label + grayscale vs live green
- Agent lane entry animation: slide-in from right at `animation-duration: 240ms` with easeOutCubic
- Drone trail fade on ranch map: already Canvas-based, add alpha decay over 2s
- Predator pulse ring smoothing: switch from step-function alpha to RAF-interpolated
- Vet-intake packet: markdown rendered in modal or dedicated panel; fields — animal ID, symptoms observed, severity, recommended next action, timestamp, herd context
- Server live path coverage: integration test that boots real World + AgentMesh + Ledger + FastAPI and asserts `/api/snapshot` returns real data
- Lighthouse: audit current build; likely wins are preload hints, font-display, code-splitting review

</specifics>

<deferred>
## Deferred Ideas

- Dashboard redesign or new information architecture — explicitly out of scope
- Multi-ranch viewer — Phase MESH-01 (separate milestone)
- 3D ranch map — out of scope
- Mobile-native rancher PWA polish beyond existing — existing 497-line file is sufficient for this milestone
- Real-time collaborative view — out of scope

</deferred>
